overview.description: AI agent for personalized business briefings and market intelligence
overview.description_long: Aim (Automated Insight Mining) builds an AI agent that monitors 5,000+ sources — including podcasts, forums, newsletters, and social media — and delivers hyper-personalized business briefings to founders, VCs, and business operators. Uses custom classification methods beyond prompting to surface contextually relevant insights. Currently in private beta with paying clients.
overview.tagline: Your AI agent for Business Briefings

history.origin_story: Founded in 2025 by Michal Najman to solve information overload for business professionals. The team observed that staying informed requires a 'full-time personal analyst' and built an AI agent to replace that need.

key_milestones.event: Raised €300k pre-seed from Miton; backed before official launch
Launched private beta; featured in EU-Startups and CzechCrunch

notable_people.name: Tomáš Matějček
notable_people.role: Founding Partner at Miton (investor, product advisor)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Aim's core value proposition — AI-curated business news briefings — is highly susceptible to commoditization. Foundation models (GPT, Claude, Perplexity) can already perform market monitoring and summarization at scale. While Aim claims custom classification methods beyond prompting, this is a thin technical moat for an early-stage startup with no proprietary training data or unique data access.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Information overload is a real and growing problem with clear demand from VCs and founders. However, Aim competes in a crowded space alongside Perplexity, Feedly, traditional media monitoring tools (Meltwater, Mention), and foundation model interfaces. Private beta with paying clients validates early PMF, but market is intensely competitive.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Only €300k pre-seed raised (July 2025), team of ~6 people, product in private beta/invite-only. Runway is extremely limited for a SaaS company that hasn't yet publicly launched. Dependent on Miton for further support.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Aim is a very early-stage startup building in a highly commoditizable category with minimal funding and a small team. The combination of high AGI displacement risk (thin tech moat), competitive market, and limited runway creates a high overall risk profile despite real customer traction signals.

metadata.notes: Full company name per CNAIP: Automated Insight Mining. Address: Křižíkova 148/34, 186 00 Praha. Funding amount converted from €300k at ~1.077 EUR/USD rate (approx $323k). Team size estimated from careers page photo description showing 6 members.
